Part 2. Air Quality Index (AQI) Classification


    healthy not_healthy 
       5054        3937

Q4. Model

            actual predicted
actual    1.000000  0.960911
predicted 0.960911  1.000000
[1] 248.3623
             actual predicted
actual    1.0000000 0.7571996
predicted 0.7571996 1.0000000
[1] 948681.7

Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ co_ug_m3 + benzene_ug_m3 + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ug_m3, family = binomial, data = data_remove_outlier, 
    na.action = na.omit)

Coefficients:
                Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)   -2.438e+01  8.761e-01 -27.822  < 2e-16 ***
co_ug_m3      -2.610e-04  1.408e-04  -1.854   0.0637 .  
benzene_ug_m3  5.339e-01  2.441e-02  21.874  < 2e-16 ***
nox_ppb        8.975e-02  3.337e-03  26.897  < 2e-16 ***
no2_ug_m3      2.340e-02  3.476e-03   6.733 1.66e-11 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

(Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)

    Null deviance: 12325.0  on 8990  degrees of freedom
Residual deviance:  1790.5  on 8986  degrees of freedom
AIC: 1800.5

Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 10

[1] "the AIC value of this GLM is  1800.45835400985"

Call:
lm(formula = aqi ~ co_ppm + no2_ppb + i_co + i_no2 + i_benzene + 
    i_nox, data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

lm(formula = aqi ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ug_m3 + nox_ppb + no2_ppb + 
    temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

[1] "the AIC value of this LM (AQI prediction based on pollutant and temperature + humidities) is  68288.4253340352"
[1] "the GVIF^(1/(2*Df)) value of this LM (AQI prediction based on pollutant and temperature + humidities) is 1"

Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ug_m3 + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ppb + temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    family = binomial, data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 10.77 on 8962 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.9446,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.9444 
F-statistic:  5459 on 28 and 8962 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16


Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ug_m3 + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ppb + temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    family = binomial, data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)
